creator: seichan-ml@wakhok.ne.jp
text:
The LDAP option is not enabled for the pkg dovecot package.

postfix has LDAP enabled.

Since I want to use LDAP, I am installing from ports.

I would like the LDAP option to be enabled by default so that it can be completed with pkg.


# diff Makefile Makefile.org
43c43
< OPTIONS_DEFAULT=GSSAPI_NONE LIBWRAP LDAP
---
> OPTIONS_DEFAULT=GSSAPI_NONE LIBWRAP
